login.title: Sign in to your account
login.accountLocked: Account temporarily locked, try again later
login.emailRequired: Unable to retrieve email address. Please set a public email on the provider and try again
login.usernameRequired: Please enter your username or email first
login.wechatDesc: Send "验证码" to the WeChat Official Account, then enter the 6-digit code below

consent.title: Review the access request
consent.requestedAccess: This application is requesting access to the following scopes.
consent.approveError: Unable to approve the access request
consent.denyError: Unable to cancel the access request

register.title: Create a new account
register.passwordHint: Min 12 chars with uppercase, lowercase, digit and special character

dashboard.title: Control Center
dashboard.heroDescription: Stand up your first application, verify sign-in flow, and keep an eye on account activity from one place.
dashboard.setupDescription: Move from first application to first successful user sign-in without leaving the console.
dashboard.setupCreateDescription: Generate client credentials and define the callback URL your product will use.
dashboard.setupConfigureTitle: Review client ID and redirect URI
dashboard.setupConfigureDescription: Open your application detail page and verify the values your product will send during login.
dashboard.setupVerifyDescription: Finish one real authorization flow to confirm cookies, callback handling, and user mapping are wired correctly.
dashboard.platformSnapshotDescription: Admin-only capacity and activity numbers for the current deployment.
dashboard.quickAccessDescription: Jump straight into the areas you are most likely to operate during setup and daily maintenance.
dashboard.quickAccessApplications: Create, inspect, and operate your OAuth applications.
dashboard.quickAccessOrganizations: Manage personal and organization workspace boundaries.
dashboard.quickAccessServiceAccounts: Issue and rotate operator credentials for automation.
dashboard.quickAccessQuotes: Submit and review quote contributions from the tools area.
dashboard.quickAccessProfile: Open account, security, and linked identity settings.
dashboard.quickAccessPoints: Check balances, streaks, and point transaction history.
dashboard.quickAccessMonitoring: Inspect node health, trends, and active alerts.
dashboard.quickAccessAdmin: Open the admin console for platform-wide operations.
dashboard.signInsDescription: Recent volume by application so you can see which integrations are actually live.
dashboard.emptyDescription: Create an application first. Once a sign-in completes, activity will show up here.

users.title: Users
users.deleteConfirm: Delete this user? This action cannot be undone.
users.passwordWarning: Copy the password now. It won't be shown again.

clients.title: OAuth Clients
clients.name: Name
clients.requireConsentDesc: Show the consent page until the user grants this client access. Remembered grants skip later prompts unless the request uses prompt=consent.
clients.deleteConfirm: Delete this client? This action cannot be undone.
clients.secretWarning: Copy the client secret now. It won't be shown again.

apps.title: Applications
apps.name: Name
apps.requireConsentDesc: Show the consent page until the user grants this application access. Remembered grants skip later prompts unless the request uses prompt=consent.
apps.deleteConfirm: Delete this app? This action cannot be undone.
apps.secretWarning: Copy the client secret now. It won't be shown again.
apps.oidcEndpointsDesc: Use these endpoints to integrate OIDC login with your app
apps.githubCompatDesc: Use these if your app only supports GitHub OAuth
apps.machineAccessEnabledDesc: This application can issue machine tokens through client_credentials and supports introspection and revocation.
apps.machineAccessDisabledDesc: Enable client_credentials in grant types to use machine token lifecycle endpoints.
apps.tokenLifecycleDesc: Operate machine tokens for this client without manually supplying the stored client secret.
apps.secretRevealHelp: Shown once after create or rotate. Copy it now.
apps.introspectionResultDesc: Latest token metadata returned by the operator endpoint.
apps.subject: Subject

organizations.title: Organizations
organizations.description: Create shared workspaces for team-owned applications and keep member access explicit.
organizations.createDescription: Start with a name and optional slug. You become the owner automatically.
organizations.name: Organization name
organizations.listDescription: Switch between organizations you belong to.
organizations.noOrganizations: No organizations yet. Create one to share applications with teammates.
organizations.pickOrganization: Select an organization to review members and manage shared access.
organizations.addMemberDescription: Search by existing username or email. Invitations are out of scope for this phase.
organizations.policyDescription: Apply organization-wide governance defaults to shared applications.
organizations.policyEntitledHint: All organization-owned applications will keep consent enabled.
organizations.policyEntitlementRequired: Upgrade this workspace to use advanced access policies.
organizations.policyReadOnly: This policy is read-only for your current role or plan.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.description: Deliver application and organization events to external systems without blocking the main write path.
webhooks.createDescription: Choose a workspace, pick event types, and store the signing secret after creation.
webhooks.name: Name
webhooks.listDescription: Review delivery status and rotate the signing secret when needed.
webhooks.empty: No webhook endpoints yet. Create one to start receiving domain events.
webhooks.latestSecretDescription: Copy this value now. It is only shown in plaintext immediately after create or rotate.

serviceAccounts.title: Service Accounts
serviceAccounts.description: Create machine identities and integration tokens for CI, automation, and external systems.
serviceAccounts.createDescription: Create the machine principal first, then issue one or more one-time reveal integration tokens.
serviceAccounts.name: Name
serviceAccounts.listDescription: Review account state, issue new tokens, and revoke leaked credentials immediately.
serviceAccounts.empty: No service accounts yet. Create one to give automation its own credentials.
serviceAccounts.rateLimitHelp: Use 0 to keep the default machine limit ({{value}}/min).
serviceAccounts.rateLimitInvalid: Rate limit must be zero or a positive integer.
serviceAccounts.latestTokenDescription: Copy this value now. It is only shown in plaintext immediately after issuance.

workspacePlans.title: Workspace Plans
workspacePlans.description: Review live quota usage for each workspace and switch organization plans when capacity needs change.
workspacePlans.personalDescription: Your default workspace for personal applications and integrations.
workspacePlans.switchDescription: Organization owners and admins can switch plans here.

branding.title: Branding
branding.description: Customize the OIDC login page for applications in this organization.

overview.title: Monitoring Overview
overview.description: Track node health, active incidents, and baseline utilization from agent reports.
overview.healthDescription: Quick breakdown of online, offline, and unknown nodes.
overview.trendsDescription: Aggregate minute buckets across accessible nodes.
overview.topStressedDescription: Nodes with the highest current CPU, memory, or disk pressure.

nodes.title: Monitoring Nodes
nodes.description: Register hosts, inspect latest agent telemetry, and drill into node history.
nodes.createDescription: Generate an enrollment token for a new agent installation.
nodes.inventoryDescription: Latest state reported by enrolled agents.

nodeDetail.trendsDescription: Minute buckets returned by the monitoring history API.
nodeDetail.latestDescription: Current utilization and last report details.
nodeDetail.installDescription: Use the generated command for install or reinstall. Rotate the enrollment token to materialize a one-time command.
nodeDetail.installUnavailable: Install command is not configured for this environment.
nodeDetail.versionDescription: Compare the reported agent version with the configured latest version.
nodeDetail.settingsDescription: Update metadata, tags, and rotate the enrollment token.
nodeDetail.disableDescription: Stop enrollment and reporting until you enable it again.

alerts.title: Monitoring Alerts
alerts.description: Manage alert rules and inspect alert events generated from agent telemetry.
alerts.formDescription: Start with workspace-wide rules, then narrow to tag or node scopes later.
alerts.rulesDescription: Thresholds evaluated on report and offline scans.
alerts.eventsDescription: Recent alert history across accessible workspaces.

form.name: Rule name
form.telegramDescription: Send firing and resolved events to the bound Telegram account.

providers.title: Social Providers
providers.name: Provider Name
providers.deleteConfirm: Delete this provider? This action cannot be undone.

settings.title: Settings
settings.registerEnabledDesc: Allow public user registration via API
settings.telegramAutoRegisterEnabledDesc: Allow users to create and bind a local account directly in a Telegram private chat with /register
settings.telegramGuessGameEnabledDesc: Allow bound users to play `/guess big` or `/guess small` in private chat by spending points
settings.telegramGuessGameDesc: Controls the Telegram private-chat guess game switch, cost, reward, and daily participation limit.
settings.siteTitleDesc: Browser tab title. Leave empty to use default
settings.corsOriginsDesc: Comma-separated origins. Leave empty to allow all.
settings.wechatMpTokenPlaceholder: Token configured in WeChat MP backend
settings.webauthnDesc: Configure Relying Party parameters for passwordless login
settings.turnstileDesc: Configure Turnstile CAPTCHA for registration anti-bot protection
settings.emailVerificationDesc: Require users to verify their email address after registration
settings.smtpDesc: Configure SMTP server for sending verification emails
settings.testEmailRecipientDesc: Optional. Leave empty to use From Address or SMTP Username

email.verifiedDesc: Your email has been verified successfully
email.checkInbox: Please check your inbox and click the verification link

telegramModeration.title: Telegram Moderation
telegramModeration.subtitle: Manage Telegram group governance from one place. Global defaults define the baseline, group overrides handle community-specific tolerance, and hit records help evaluate effectiveness and false positives.
telegramModeration.defaultsDescription: Applied to all connected groups unless a dedicated override exists.
telegramModeration.groupEditorDescription: Create stricter or looser rules for specific groups.
telegramModeration.managedGroupsDescription: Auto-detected groups where the bot is present. Click to configure policy quickly.
telegramModeration.emptyManagedGroups: No joined groups detected yet. After adding the bot to a group, entries will appear here.
telegramModeration.emptyGroups: No group override yet. Start with a high-risk group first.
telegramModeration.groupDefenseSummary: Defense group {{defenseGroup}}, cross-group ban starts after {{threshold}} hits
telegramModeration.hitsDescription: {{total}} total hits in the current result set.

hints.enabled: When disabled, group messages are never intercepted.
hints.adminBypass: Group admins and owners are skipped by default.
hints.whitelistBypass: Whitelisted users and keywords bypass moderation.
hints.notifyInGroup: Send a notification message after enforcement.
hints.restrictMemberCommands: When enabled, non-admin users can only run allowed commands.
hints.floodLimitEnabled: Limit high message frequency in a short period.
hints.repeatLimitEnabled: Handle repeated same-content spam by threshold.
hints.joinRequestNotifyEnabled: Push join request notifications to target chat.
hints.newMemberMuteEnabled: Temporarily restrict new members after joining.
hints.crossGroupBanEnabled: Once the threshold is met, ban the user across other groups in the same defense group.
hints.groupCrossGroupBan: Only peer groups in the same defense group with cross-group ban enabled will be affected.

mfa.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
mfa.verifyDesc: Enter your verification code to continue
mfa.totpDesc: Scan the QR code with Google Authenticator or similar app
mfa.setupDesc: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app, or enter the secret manually
mfa.backupCodesDesc: Save these backup codes securely. Each can only be used once
mfa.webauthnPrompt: Click the button below to verify with your security key

webauthn.title: Passkey / Security Key
webauthn.notConfigured: WebAuthn is not configured. Please set RP ID and RP Origins in system settings.
webauthn.name: Key Name

auditLogs.title: Audit Logs
auditLogs.subtitle: Review write operations, security events, and source-tracked system activity in one place.
auditLogs.filtersDescription: Filter by user, action, resource, source, status, and keyword.
auditLogs.telegramShortcutsDescription: Jump into Telegram bot audit views for binding, registration, check-in, quote submissions, and common failure reasons.
auditLogs.keywordPlaceholder: Search username, resource ID, detail, or UA

authInit.serviceUnavailableDescription: Authentication initialization hit a temporary service error. This usually happens during backend rolling restarts or a brief gateway outage. Please retry shortly.
authInit.notFoundDescription: The environment is missing the authentication bootstrap endpoint. This usually points to a routing, proxy, or deployment misconfiguration.

unauthorized.title: Authentication expired
unauthorized.description: This request requires a fresh sign-in before it can continue.

forbidden.title: Access denied
forbidden.description: Your account does not have permission to view this page or perform this action.

not_found.title: Resource not found
not_found.description: The target endpoint or resource could not be found. It may have been removed, or the environment routing is misconfigured.

server.title: Service temporarily unavailable
server.description: The server returned an unexpected response. This is usually a temporary fault or restart window, so retry shortly.

network.title: Network connection problem
network.description: The request did not reach the server. Check the network, gateway, or proxy path.

timeout.title: Request timed out
timeout.description: The service took too long to respond. Please retry in a moment.

unknown.title: Request failed
unknown.description: An unclassified error occurred. Retry and inspect the server logs if it keeps happening.

points.title: Points Center
points.emailVerificationDesc: Check-in feature requires email verification. We've sent a verification email to {{email}}. Please check your inbox.

adminPoints.title: Points Management
adminPoints.amountHint: Positive to add, negative to deduct

quotes.title: Quote Submissions
quotes.subtitle: Submit curated quotes for moderation before they enter the public pool.
quotes.submitDescription: Quote text, author, source, and tags all enter the review queue.
quotes.emptyMine: You have not submitted any quotes yet

guidance.review: Every submission starts as pending and must be approved by an administrator.
guidance.points: Hourly submission quota depends on your level. Overflow submissions will try to spend points automatically.

placeholders.quote: Example: What matters is not what happens, but how you respond.
placeholders.author: Author name

admin.title: Quote Moderation
admin.subtitle: Review submissions, metadata, and moderator notes in one place.
admin.queueDescription: Filter review items by status, channel, and author.
admin.dialogDescription: Polish the content before approving or rejecting it.
admin.empty: No records match the current filters

profile.title: Profile
profile.setPasswordDesc: You signed up via social login. Set a password to enable password login.
profile.passwordHint: Min 12 chars with uppercase, lowercase, digit and special character
profile.authorizedAppsDesc: Review apps that can access your account and revoke remembered consent.
profile.unlinkConfirm: Are you sure you want to unlink this account?
profile.telegramBindCodeDesc: Send the command below to the Telegram bot and it will bind the current Telegram account to your site account immediately.
profile.telegramBindCodeEmpty: Generate a code first, then send `/bind <code>` to the Telegram bot.
profile.telegramConfirmDesc: This link was issued by the Telegram bot. Confirm to bind the current signed-in account to that Telegram account.
profile.telegramBotFlowDesc: Send `/bind` to the Telegram bot first. It will return a confirmation link. When you come back here, a confirmation card will appear at the top. Use `/checkin` or the inline button after linking.
